mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TkexamHstryDAO.profQuizTkexamHstryList 설 명 : 교수퀴즈응시이력목록조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TKEXAM_HSTRY.REG_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO , NVL((SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT WHERE ORG_ID = USR.ORG_ID AND DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID),'-') AS DEPTNM , USR.USER_RPRS_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'HSTRY_GBNCD' AND CD = TKEXAM_HSTRY.HSTRY_GBNCD) AS HSTRY_GBNNM , TKEXAM_HSTRY.REG_DTTM , TKEXAM_HSTRY.TKEXAM_IP FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_HSTRY TKEXAM_HSTRY JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON TKEXAM_HSTRY.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND USR.USER_ID_STSCD = 'APRV_CMPTN' WHERE TKEXAM_HSTRY.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND TKEXAM_HSTRY.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TKEXAM_HSTRY.REG_DTTM DESC
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : TkexamHstryDAO.userListRetkexamHstryRegist 설 명 : 사용자목록재응시이력등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_TKEXAM_HSTRY ( TKEXAM_HSTRY_ID , USER_ID , EXAM_DTL_ID , HSTRY_GBNCD , TKEXAM_CNT , TOT_SCR , TKEXAM_MNTS , TKEXAM_SDTTM , TKEXAM_EDTTM , EVLYN , EVL_DTTM , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , TKEXAM_IP )
SELECT #{item.subParam} AS TKEXAM_HSTRY_ID , TKEXAM.USER_ID , TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID , 'REEXAM_STNG' AS HSTRY_GBNCD , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT , NVL(SCR.TOT_SCR, 0) AS TOT_SCR , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_MNTS , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM , TKEXAM_RSLT.EVLYN , TKEXAM_RSLT.EVL_DTTM , #{item.rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() , HSTRY.TKEXAM_IP FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ANSW.USER_ID , EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID , SUM(ANSW.SCR) AS TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW JOIN TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR ON ANSW.EXAMPPR_ID = EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID AND ANSW.USER_ID = EXAMPPR.USER_ID GROUP BY ANSW.USER_ID, EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID ) SCR ON SCR.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID AND SCR.TKEXAM_ID = TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT TKEXAM_RSLT ON TKEXAM_RSLT.TKEXAM_ID = TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID AND TKEXAM_RSLT.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID , EXAM_DTL_ID , TKEXAM_IP , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY USER_ID, EXAM_DTL_ID ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_HSTRY ) HSTRY ON HSTRY.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID AND HSTRY.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID AND HSTRY.RNUM = 1 WHERE TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{item.examDtlId} AND TKEXAM.USER_ID = #{item.userId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TkexamHstryDAO.userTkexamInfoSelect 설 명 : 사용자시험응시정보조회 */ SELECT TKEXAM.USER_ID , TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID , 'EXAMPPR_GRNT' AS HSTRY_GBNCD , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT , NVL(SCR.TOT_SCR, 0) AS TOT_SCR , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_MNTS , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM , TKEXAM_RSLT.EVLYN , TKEXAM_RSLT.EVL_DTTM , HSTRY.TKEXAM_IP FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ANSW.USER_ID , EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID , SUM(ANSW.SCR) AS TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW JOIN TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR ON ANSW.EXAMPPR_ID = EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID AND ANSW.USER_ID = EXAMPPR.USER_ID GROUP BY ANSW.USER_ID, EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID ) SCR ON SCR.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID AND SCR.TKEXAM_ID = TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT TKEXAM_RSLT ON TKEXAM_RSLT.TKEXAM_ID = TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID AND TKEXAM_RSLT.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID , EXAM_DTL_ID , TKEXAM_IP , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY USER_ID, EXAM_DTL_ID ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_HSTRY ) HSTRY ON HSTRY.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID AND HSTRY.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID AND HSTRY.RNUM = 1 WHERE TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID = #{tkexamId} AND TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND TKEXAM.USER_ID = #{userId}
